xwikidoc.reference: OpenProject.Code.Template.Project Meeting Notes yyyy MM dd.WebHome
xwikidoc.web: OpenProject.Code.Template.Project Meeting Notes yyyy MM dd
xwikidoc.name: WebHome
xwikidoc.creator: xwiki:XWiki.Admin
xwikidoc.author: xwiki:XWiki.Admin
xwikidoc.title: Project Meeting Notes yyyy MM dd
xwikidoc.content:
= 🗓️ Meeting Notes =
{{info}} Use this page to capture project discussions, decisions, blockers, and action items. {{/info}}
== 📌 Meeting Details ==
|= Field |= Value | Date | //yyyy-MM-dd// | Participants | //Name 1, Name 2, Name 3// | Facilitator | //Name placeholder// | Related OpenProject epic | //Parent ticket placeholder//
== 🧠 Discussion Notes ==
* Reviewed current project status. * Discussed open risks and blockers. * Clarified ownership for upcoming tasks. * Agreed on next delivery priorities.
== ✅ Decisions ==
|= Decision |= Rationale | Proceed with the current implementation approach. | It matches the project scope and avoids unnecessary complexity. | Track unresolved questions as OpenProject tickets. | This keeps decisions visible and actionable. | Review specifications before the next milestone. | This reduces delivery risk.
== 📋 Action Items ==
|= Action Item |= Owner |= Due Date |= Status |Finalize project specifications | //Owner// |//yyyy-MM-dd//| New |Review open blockers | //Owner// |//yyyy-MM-dd //| In progress |Update project dashboard | //Owner// |//yyyy-MM-dd//| New |Prepare next meeting agenda | //Owner// |//yyyy-MM-dd //| New
== 🚧 Blockers & Risks ==
|= Risk / Blocker |= Impact |= Mitigation | Dependency not yet confirmed | May delay implementation | Create follow-up ticket | Requirements still unclear | May cause rework | Schedule specification review | Timeline pressure | May reduce testing time | Prioritize critical scope first
== 🔜 Next Meeting ==
* **Date:** //yyyy-MM-dd// * **Focus:** Review progress, close blockers, and validate next milestone.

object.name: OpenProject.Code.Template.Project Meeting Notes yyyy MM dd.WebHome
